header.title: WeCarely
listing.heading: Home Care Agencies in Houston
listing.subheading: Every home care agency licensed in Houston, in one place. Filter by language, insurance, and the kind of care you need. Free to browse — no sign-up required.
listing.empty: No agencies match these filters. Try removing one.
footer.pledgeHeadline: We don't make up the ratings.
footer.pledgeBody: We show what CMS and Google already publish, sorted by filters that match how families actually search. The directory is free to browse — no account required.
footer.rankingNote: Some details go out of date, so always confirm with the agency before deciding. No agency pays to rank higher on this list. Ever.
footer.dataSource: CMS Home Health Compare · Google · Verified updates
footer.languages: English · Español · Tiếng Việt · 中文
